# Shared CSS (FOCSS)

## Why this folder exists

Single design system for site + planner. Tokens and bundles avoid hardcoded colors in TSX.

## What is here

- core/theme.css, utilities.css, components.css
- core/locked/site|admin|planner — surface modules

- `docs/architecture/04-CSS-SOLUTION.md`
- `docs/architecture/02-DOMAINS.md`
